title: WIP: Mamba-Attention Hybrid — 18L (15 SSM + 3 GQA), First SSM Entry
author: johnlennyt5

data.description: Hybrid model replacing most Transformer layers with Mamba-2 selective state-space blocks while keeping a few attention layers for global context.
Uses grouped query attention in the remaining attention layers.
Hybrid dispatch uses a U-Net encoder-decoder with skip connections.
Gradient checkpointing applied selectively to Mamba layers.

novel_contributions: First SSM-based submission to Parameter Golf
Hybrid Mamba-Attention architecture with 15 Mamba-2 SSM layers and 3 GQA attention layers
U-Net encoder-decoder dispatch with skip connections
Muon optimizer applied to Mamba matrix parameters
GPTQ int6 quantization pipeline extended to Mamba parameters
Selective gradient checkpointing for Mamba layers
